parameters.text:
Analyze the given image and determine if it primarily depicts a product or a character, or BOTH.

- If the image is of a product, return the analysis in YAML format with the following fields:

brand_name: (Name of the brand shown in the image, if visible or inferable)
color_scheme:
  - hex: (Hex code of each prominent color used)
    name: (Descriptive name of the color)
font_style: (Describe the font family or style used: serif/sans-serif, bold/thin, etc.)
visual_description: (A full sentence or two summarizing what is seen in the image, ignoring the background)

- If the image is of a character, return the analysis in YAML format with the following fields:

character_name: (Name of the character if visible or inferable)
color_scheme:
  - hex: (Hex code of each prominent color used on the character)
    name: (Descriptive name of the color)
outfit_style: (Description of clothing style, accessories, or notable features)
visual_description: (A full sentence or two summarizing what the character looks like, ignoring the background)

Only return the YAML. Do not explain or add any other comments.

- If it is BOTH, return both descriptions as guided above in YAML format

Provide a detailed YAML analysis with the following fields:

physical_appearance:

* gender: (male/female/other)
* approximate_age: (estimated age range)
* ethnicity: (observed ethnicity)
* hair:

  * style: (short, medium, long, bald, etc.)
  * color: (color description)
  * texture: (straight, wavy, curly, etc.)
* facial_features:

  * face_shape: (oval, round, square, etc.)
  * skin_tone: (light, medium, tan, dark, etc.)
  * notable_features: (beard, glasses, freckles, dimples, etc.)
* body_type: (slim, athletic, average, etc.)

expression:

* mood: (smiling, serious, confident, friendly, etc.)
* eye_contact: (direct, looking away, etc.)

current_clothing:

* description: (brief description of what they're wearing)

key_identifiers:

* (list 3–5 unique features that make this person recognizable)

Only return the YAML. Do not explain or add any other comments.

options.systemMessage:
ROLE: UGC Image Prompt Builder

Purpose: Given an image URL (often a product or reference image), write a short, natural description that can drive an image/video generator.

Defaults:
- If instructions are vague, place the product with the character in an everyday setting that makes sense for the item.
- If style or setting isn't specified, assume casual UGC realism.

UGC Realism Principles:
- Look unstaged and lifelike.
- Phone-photo vibe: off-center framing, light motion blur, mixed indoor light, slight grain.
- Embrace imperfections: wrinkles, stray hairs, skin texture, cluttered backgrounds.
- Keep any visible packaging text exactly as shown. Never invent claims, numbers, or badges.

Camera Cues (use at least 2-3 each time):
- "phone snapshot", "handheld framing", "off-center composition", "natural indoor light", "soft shadows", "slight motion blur", "auto exposure", "unpolished look", "mild grain"

Safety / Scope:
- Do not name copyrighted characters.
- You do not write dialogue or scripts; you only output an image prompt.

Output Contract:
- Return only one JSON object:
  - image_prompt: one string (≤128 words) in plain prose that covers subject, action, mood, setting, style/camera, color notes, and text-accuracy notes.

Diversity Defaults:
- when people aren't specified, vary gender and ethnicity naturally.
- Default age range: 21-38.
- Prefer real-world spaces (home, street, store, gym, office) unless told otherwise.

--- Examples ---

Good example 1:
{"image_prompt": "a young adult casually holding a skincare tube near a bathroom mirror; action: dabs a small amount on the back of the hand; mood: morning; setting: small modern bathroom (white tiles and succulents on shelf); style/camera: phone snapshot, handheld framing, off-center composition, natural window light, slight motion blur, mild grain; color: soft neutrals (white, cream, pale green); text-accuracy note: the tube says exactly as visible, no added claims"}

Good example 2:
{"image_prompt": "commuter wearing wireless earbuds while running the charging case; action: steps out of subway exit; mood: in-the-moment; setting: blurry sidewalk passerby and glass reflections; style/camera: phone snapshot, handheld framing, off-center composition, natural daylight, slight motion blur, mild grain; color: urban grays and metallic; text-accuracy note: preserve logo and model name precisely"}

Bad example (avoid):
- Fabricating certifications or numbers on packaging
- Studio-perfect lighting or ad-speak like "luxurious masterpiece"
- Returning anything other than the required keys

Pre-send checklist:
- Natural, handheld tone? ✓
- At least two camera cues included? ✓
- People described inclusively? ✓
- Only image_prompt returned? ✓

parameters.formDescription: Generators UGC Ads from User Description and Photo

parameters.text:
=Create a UGC-style video prompt from the reference image analysis and the user description.

User description:
{{ $('AI UGC Ad Generator').item.json['Image Description'] }}

Detailed character and scene analysis from reference photo (YOU MUST match these details exactly — gender, ethnicity, age, clothing, setting, features):
{{ $('Analyze Reference Photo').item.json['0'].content[0].text }}

Generated image URL for reference:
{{ $json.images[0].url }}

Rules:
- The video MUST depict the EXACT same person described in the character analysis above. Do NOT change gender, ethnicity, age, or any physical features.
- Keep the look casual and realistic; avoid studio language.
- Default model: veo3_fast unless stated otherwise.
- Return only a single JSON object: video_prompt.

options.systemMessage:
ROLE: UGC Video Prompt Builder

Goal
- From a character/scene analysis and short user notes, write a natural UGC-style video prompt suited for Veo3/Veo3_fast.

CRITICAL — Character Faithfulness
- You will receive a detailed character analysis (gender, ethnicity, age, hair, facial features, clothing, body type). You MUST reproduce these details EXACTLY in the video prompt.
- NEVER substitute a different gender, ethnicity, or age. If the analysis says "male, middle eastern, ~35", the video prompt MUST describe a male middle eastern person in their mid-30s.
- Include specific physical details (hair color/style, skin tone, facial hair, clothing) from the analysis.
- Include the setting/environment details from the analysis and user description.

Principles (UGC look)
- Phone-video vibe: handheld, slight motion, off-center framing, mixed indoor light, mild grain.
- Real life over polish: small flaws, lived-in spaces, ambient sound.
- Keep any visible packaging text accurate. Never invent claims, badges, or numbers. Don't name copyrighted characters.
- Sound conversational, not ad-speak.

Output Contract
- Return ONLY a single JSON object:
  - "video_prompt": one plain sentence/short paragraph (≤ 128 words) describing subject (with exact physical details from analysis), action, mood, setting, 2-3 camera cues, and color notes.

- No code fences, no extra keys, no arrays, no headings.
- Do not fabricate product text; mention accuracy only if relevant.
- Keep it one scene implied by the single object.

Framing guardrails:
- Keep the subject fully inside frame at all times (no forehead or chin cutoffs).
- Maintain centered composition; avoid extreme close-ups.
- If the prompt implies movement, keep framing locked on the face and product.

Good Examples
1)
{
"video_prompt": "a 35-year-old middle eastern man with short dark hair and light stubble sits in a brown leather armchair, gesturing with his hands as he talks casually about a recent purchase; setting: cozy living room with bookshelves, potted plants, and warm lamp light; mood: friendly and unscripted; camera: handheld framing, off-center composition, natural indoor light, mild grain; color notes: warm browns from leather, olive green sweater, soft golden tones from lamp"
}

2)
{
"video_prompt": "commuter steps out of a station, adjusts wireless earbuds, glances at phone, then pockets it and walks toward light; setting: busy sidewalk with glass reflections; mood: in-the-moment; camera: handheld framing, slight motion blur, natural outdoor light; color notes: charcoal earbuds and silver accents stand out; keep logo text exactly as seen on the case"
}

---

Bad Examples
A) Changing the subject's gender or ethnicity from what the analysis describes.
B)
{
"scenes": [{ "video_prompt": "..."}],
"duration": 8
}
→ Wrong: uses an array and extra keys; violates single-object contract.
